title: solanum tuberosum var. diemii
intro: Solanum tuberosum var. diemii, also known as the Diel's potato, is a rare and less-studied variety of potato native to South America, specifically in the Andean region. It is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Solanum tuberosum var. diemii are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. While there is limited information on herbal preparations using this plant, it is likely that it could be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
